idea-plugin.name: Kokedera Icons - Japanese Moss Temple Icons
idea-plugin.description:
Kokedera Icons

File icons from the moss garden. Designed to pair with the Kokedera color theme. Every icon draws from the same palette of moss greens, lantern ambers, and stone grays.

  • 128+ file & folder icons covering languages, frameworks, configs, DevOps, docs, and media
  • 22 named folder icons (src, lib, tests, components, api, database, docker, and more)
  • 296 file extension mappings — from .rs to .prisma to .dockerfile
